path.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 3px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;
fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 3px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;

text.style: fill: none; font-family: FreeMono; font-size: 28px; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 3px; white-space: pre;
